debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I J : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
h_J_le_I : I ≤ J
h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

failed_attempts:
intro N h_N_in_I
      let N' : I := ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩
      have h_A_exists : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := by
        exact RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I N'
      rcases h_A_exists with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      let h_decomp := hf' N'.prop
      let h_subset := hf N'.prop
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_disj : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) :=
          J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_subset h_A_not_mem
        rw [h_decomp] at h_disj
        have h_bot : N = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (disjoint_comm.mp h_disj) h_N_le_A
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ N'.prop)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
        rw [← h_decomp]
        exact le_sSup h_mem
      have h_eq : N = A.val := le_antisymm h_N_le_A h_A_le_N
      rw [h_eq]
      exact A.prop
    ext N
    constructor
    · apply h_final_right
    · apply h_final_left

intro N hN
      obtain ⟨A, hA⟩ := RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩
      obtain ⟨B, hB_sub, rfl⟩ := h_I_le_J hN
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_out
        have h_disj := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop hB_sub h_out
        refine I.not_bot_mem hN (bot_unique ?_)
        rwa [disjoint_comm, disjoint_iff_inf_le, inf_of_le_left hA] at h_disj
      exact (le_antisymm (le_sSup h_mem) hA) ▸ A.prop
    exact SetLike.coe_injective (Set.Subset.antisymm h_final_right h_final_left)

intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ⟨h_N_in_I, h_N_not_in_J⟩
      let N' : I := ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩
      have h_A : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I) N'
      rcases h_A with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      let h_B₁ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_B₂ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_B₁
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B₂ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) ≤ A.val := h_B₁ ▸ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [← h_B₁] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (I.not_bot_mem h_N_in_I)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
        simpa [← h_B₁] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N ∈ J := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ▸ A.prop
      aesop
    ext x
    constructor
    · apply h_final_right
    · apply h_final_left

intro N h_mem
      let N' : I := ⟨N, h_mem⟩
      have h_A : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I N'
      rcases h_A with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      let h_B₁ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_B₂ := hf N'.prop
      have h_mem' : A.val ∈ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) :=
          J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B₂ h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) ≤ A.val := h_B₁ ▸ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = ⊥ :=
          Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (disjoint_comm.mp h_aux) h_aux'
        rw [← h_B₁] at h_last
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_last ▸ h_mem)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
        simpa [← h_B₁] using le_sSup h_mem'
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A
      rw [← h_A_eq_N]
      exact A.prop
    ext N
    constructor <;> apply_assumption

intro N h_N_in_I

intro N hN
      obtain ⟨A, hNA⟩ := RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hB_sub, hB_sup⟩
      have h_le (b) (hb : b ∈ B) : b ≤ A.val := (le_sSup hb).trans (hB_sup.ge.trans hNA)
      have h_eq (b) (hb : b ∈ B) : b = A.val :=
        UniqueGE J J ⟨b, hB_sub hb⟩ A ⟨b, hB_sub hb⟩ ⟨h_le b hb, le_rfl⟩
      have : B.Nonempty := by
        by_contra h; simp [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h] at hB_sup
        exact I.not_bot_mem (hB_sup ▸ hN)
      rcases this with ⟨b, hb⟩
      have : B = {A.val} := by
        ext x; constructor
        · intro hx; rw [h_eq x hx]; exact Set.mem_singleton _
        · rintro rfl; rw [← h_eq b hb]; exact hb
      rw [this, sSup_singleton] at hB_sup
      rw [← hB_sup]; exact A.prop
    ext N
    exact ⟨fun h => h_final_left N h, fun h => h_final_right N h⟩

intro N hNI
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hNI⟩ with ⟨M, hNM⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hNI with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      have hbM : ∀ b ∈ B, b = M.val := by
        intro b hb
        apply congr_arg Subtype.val
        apply UniqueGE J J ⟨b, hBJ hb⟩ ⟨b, hBJ hb⟩ M
        exact ⟨le_rfl, le_trans (le_sSup hb) hNM⟩
      have hB : B = {M.val} := by
        ext x
        constructor
        · intro hx; exact hbM x hx
        · intro hx
          rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
          rw [hx]
          by_contra h_not_mem
          have h_nonempty : B.Nonempty := by
            by_contra h_empty
            rw [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, sSup_empty] at h_empty
            exact I.not_bot_mem hNI h_empty
          rcases h_nonempty with ⟨b, hb⟩
          exact h_not_mem (hbM b hb ▸ hb)
      rw [hB, sSup_singleton]
      exact M.prop
    ext N
    exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hB, rfl⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let U := ⋃ b ∈ B, f b (hB b)
      have hU : U ⊆ I := by
        intro x hx; simp [U] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨b, hb, hxb⟩; exact hf b (hB hb) hxb
      have hNU : sSup B ∈ U := by
        by_contra h
        have : Disjoint (sSup B) (sSup U) := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN hU h
        have : sSup U = sSup B := by
          apply le_antisymm
          · apply sSup_le; intro x hx; simp [U] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨b, hb, hxb⟩
            rw [hf' b (hB hb)] at *; exact le_trans (le_sSup hxb) (le_sSup hb)
          · apply sSup_le; intro b hb
            rw [hf' b (hB hb)]; apply sSup_le_sSup; intro x hx
            simp [U]; exact ⟨b, hb, hx⟩
        rw [this] at this
        exact I.not_bot_mem hN (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_self this)
      simp [U] at hNU
      rcases hNU with ⟨b, hb, hxb⟩
      have : sSup B = b := le_antisymm
        (by rw [hf' b (hB hb)]; exact le_sSup hxb)
        (le_sSup hb)
      rw [this]; exact hB hb
    ext N; constructor <;> [apply h_final_right, apply h_final_left]

      let h_B₂ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_B₁
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B₂ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) ≤ A.val := h_B₁ ▸ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [← h_B₁] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (I.not_bot_mem h_N_in_I)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
        simpa [← h_B₁] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N ∈ J := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ▸ A.prop
      aesop
    SetLike.coe_injective (Set.Subset.antisymm h_final_right h_final_left)

intro N h_N_in_I
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ with ⟨A, h_NA⟩
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J A with ⟨B, h_AB⟩
      have h_eq : B = ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ :=
        UniqueGE I I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ B ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ ⟨le_trans h_NA h_AB, le_rfl⟩
      have h_eq' : A.val = N := le_antisymm (h_eq ▸ h_AB) h_NA
      rw [← h_eq']
      exact A.prop
    ext N
    constructor
    · apply h_final_right
    · apply h_final_left

intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ⟨h_N_in_I, h_N_not_in_J⟩
      let N' : I := ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩
      have h_A : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I) N'
      rcases h_A with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      let h_B₁ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_B₂ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_B₁
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B₂ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) ≤ A.val := h_B₁ ▸ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [← h_B₁] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (I.not_bot_mem h_N_in_I)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
        simpa [← h_B₁] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N ∈ J := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ▸ A.prop
      aesop
    exact SetLike.coe_injective (Set.Subset.antisymm h_final_right h_final_left)
